creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text: Our mascotte Groff the BSDGoat roams around the world, changing keeper after each BSD event. It has a Twitter account https://twitter.com/GroffBSDGoat which needs a verification e-mail address from Twitter. Currently it is set to a personal address of me, but having an alias that redirects to the current address would be less troublesome for previous keepers.
